tasks.title: Investigate QZPay schema incompatibility
tasks.description: Read the WIP seed files in packages/seed/src/required/.wip/ and compare them against the QZPay Drizzle schema types in packages/db/src/billing/. Identify what fields/types are mismatched. Document findings and propose fix approach (adapt seeds vs adapt schema vs create compatibility layer).

tasks.title: Fix QZPay schema compatibility in seed files
tasks.description: Based on T-001 findings, fix the type incompatibilities between seed files and QZPay Drizzle schema. Update seed files (billingPlans, billingAddons, billingEntitlements, billingLimits, sponsorshipPackages) to be compatible with the current schema. Ensure upsert behavior to prevent duplicates.

tasks.title: Re-enable billing seeds in index.ts and verify
tasks.description: Uncomment/re-enable all billing seed imports and exports in packages/seed/src/required/index.ts. Run pnpm db:fresh-dev to verify seeds execute without errors. Verify all 9 plans, 5 addons, 31 entitlements, 6 limits, and sponsorship packages are inserted. Add a test that validates seed execution.

tasks.title: Add Zod schemas for plan change request/response
tasks.description: Create Zod schemas in packages/schemas for: PlanChangeRequestSchema (newPlanId, billingInterval), PlanChangeResponseSchema (subscriptionId, previousPlanId, newPlanId, effectiveAt, proratedAmount, status). Export from packages/schemas.

tasks.title: Create plan change API endpoint
tasks.description: Create POST /api/v1/billing/subscriptions/:id/change-plan route in apps/api. Implement handler that: validates request with Zod schema, checks user owns the subscription, determines if upgrade (immediate) or downgrade (scheduled at period end), calculates proration for upgrades, calls QZPay SDK to update subscription, updates entitlements, sends notification. Return PlanChangeResponse.

tasks.title: PlanChangeDialog: plan fetching, display UI, and plan selection
tasks.description: Replace placeholder in apps/web/src/components/billing/PlanChangeDialog.tsx. Implement: fetch available plans from GET /api/v1/billing/plans, display plan cards with pricing and features, highlight current plan, show prorated cost for upgrades, show 'effective at period end' for downgrades. Handle trial users (show message that plan change is available after trial).

tasks.title: Make webhook secret mandatory in production mode
tasks.description: In packages/billing/src/adapters/mercadopago.ts: (1) Add validation that throws error when sandbox===false and webhookSecret is empty/missing. (2) Add warning log when sandbox===true and webhookSecret is missing. (3) Add validation for empty accessToken string. (4) Add constant MERCADO_PAGO_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS to billing.constants.ts. Write unit tests for all new validation cases.

tasks.title: Fix SQL injection pattern in notification retention service
tasks.description: In apps/api/src/services/notification-retention.service.ts, replace sql.raw(retentionDays.toString()) with safe parameterized approach. Options: (a) Use Drizzle's interval helper, (b) validate retentionDays is positive integer < 365 before using sql.raw, (c) use sql`NOW() - make_interval(days => ${retentionDays})`. Add input validation with bounds checking (1-365 days). Write tests for boundary values.

tasks.title: Migrate local promo codes to database
tasks.description: Create a seed/migration script that inserts the 3 local config promo codes (HOSPEDA_FREE, LANZAMIENTO_50, BIENVENIDO_30) into billing_promo_codes table. Update promo-code.service.ts to remove the local code fallback logic (the if promoCode.id.startsWith('local_') branch). All promo codes will now use the atomic tryRedeemAtomically() path. Write migration test. Update existing promo code tests.

tasks.title: Add startup validation for billing configuration
tasks.description: Create packages/billing/src/validation/config-validator.ts with Zod schemas to validate: (1) all plan prices >= 0, (2) trial days >= 0 when hasTrial, (3) promo code discounts 0-100, (4) promo code expiration dates in future (warn only), (5) addon limitIncrease > 0, (6) all EntitlementKey references exist. Call validateBillingConfig() during app startup in apps/api/src/index.ts. Fail fast on critical errors, warn on non-critical. Write comprehensive tests.

tasks.title: Write tests for MercadoPago webhook handler
tasks.description: Create apps/api/test/webhooks/mercadopago.test.ts with tests covering: (1) valid payment.created webhook processing, (2) valid payment.updated webhook processing, (3) subscription_preapproval events, (4) webhook signature verification (valid + invalid), (5) idempotency (duplicate providerEventId rejection), (6) invalid/malformed payloads, (7) error handling and dead letter queue behavior, (8) concurrent webhook delivery. Mock QZPay SDK and DB calls.

tasks.title: Write tests for billing-metrics.service.ts
tasks.description: Create apps/api/test/services/billing-metrics.service.test.ts covering: getOverviewMetrics (MRR, active subs, churn rate, ARPU, trial conversion), getRevenueTimeSeries (monthly aggregation, empty months), getSubscriptionBreakdown (by plan), getRecentActivity. Mock database queries. Test edge cases: no data, single record, large datasets.

tasks.title: Write tests for billing-settings.service.ts
tasks.description: Create apps/api/test/services/billing-settings.service.test.ts covering: get/set settings, audit trail storage, validation of setting values, error handling for invalid keys.

tasks.title: Write tests for addon-entitlement.service.ts
tasks.description: Create apps/api/test/services/addon-entitlement.service.test.ts covering: entitlement grant when addon purchased, entitlement revoke when addon expires/cancelled, stacking behavior (multiple addons granting same entitlement), edge cases (invalid addon, missing customer).

tasks.title: Write tests for notification-retention.service.ts
tasks.description: Create apps/api/test/services/notification-retention.service.test.ts covering: markExpired with various retention periods, purgeExpired with grace periods, runRetentionPolicy full cycle, edge cases (no records, all expired, none expired). Verify parameterized SQL (post T-008 fix).

tasks.title: Write tests for billing-error-handler.ts
tasks.description: Create apps/api/test/services/billing-error-handler.test.ts covering: error classification (billing vs generic errors), response formatting (status codes, error messages), Sentry integration (error capture with context), sanitization of sensitive data in error messages.

tasks.title: Create BillingErrorBoundary component with tests
tasks.description: Create apps/web/src/components/billing/BillingErrorBoundary.tsx that catches React errors in billing components. Shows user-friendly fallback UI with retry option. Include role='alert' on error state. Write unit tests for: rendering children normally, catching errors, showing fallback, retry functionality.

tasks.title: Configure Sentry release with git commit SHA
tasks.description: Update Sentry initialization in 3 locations to include release property using git commit SHA: (1) apps/api/src/middlewares/sentry.ts, (2) apps/web/src/lib/sentry.ts, (3) apps/admin/src/lib/sentry/sentry.config.ts. Use environment variable SENTRY_RELEASE or generate from git rev-parse --short HEAD at build time. Update build scripts if needed.

tasks.title: Add database index for expiredAt on billing_notification_log
tasks.description: Generate a new Drizzle migration that adds an index on billing_notification_log.expired_at column. This is needed for the daily retention cron job that queries by expiredAt. Run pnpm db:generate and verify the migration SQL is correct. Test that migration applies cleanly.

tasks.title: Remove deprecated apiUrl props from billing components
tasks.description: Remove the deprecated apiUrl prop from: (1) ActiveAddons - remove from interface and function signature, (2) PaymentMethodSection - remove from interface and function signature. Search for any callers passing apiUrl prop and update them. Update existing tests that use the prop. Remove backward compatibility comments.

tasks.title: Create billing i18n namespace with Spanish translations
tasks.description: Create packages/i18n/src/locales/es/billing.json with all strings extracted from the 15 billing components. Organize by component: activeAddons, paymentMethods, planChange, subscription, invoices, cancelSubscription, checkout, common (shared strings like Reintentar, Predeterminado). Include all labels, titles, messages, error texts, empty states, CTA buttons.

tasks.title: Create billing i18n namespace with English translations
tasks.description: Create packages/i18n/src/locales/en/billing.json translating all strings from the Spanish version. Maintain same key structure. Ensure proper English for Argentina-specific terms (e.g., 'complementos' -> 'add-ons', 'resenas' -> 'reviews').

tasks.title: Integrate i18n in core billing components (7 components)
tasks.description: Replace hardcoded Spanish strings with i18n translation calls in: ActiveAddons, PaymentMethodSection, PlanChangeDialog, SubscriptionStatusCard, InvoicePaymentDialog, InvoiceListSection, CancelSubscriptionDialog. Import useTranslation from i18n package. Update component tests to verify i18n integration.

tasks.title: Convert BillingMetricsService to singleton pattern
tasks.description: Refactor BillingMetricsService to use singleton/lazy initialization instead of being instantiated per request in the metrics route handler. Options: (a) module-level singleton with getBillingMetricsService(), (b) dependency injection via Hono context. Add caching layer with 5-minute TTL for dashboard overview queries. Update metrics routes to use the singleton. Write tests verifying singleton behavior and cache TTL.

tasks.title: Review and optimize billing service instantiation patterns
tasks.description: Audit all billing service classes for per-request instantiation. Document which services should be singletons vs per-request. Apply singleton pattern where appropriate (stateless services with DB access). Ensure no shared mutable state issues. Write brief ADR documenting the pattern decision.

tasks.title: E2E tests: subscription creation, payment, and upgrade flow
tasks.description: Create apps/api/test/e2e/flows/billing/subscription-lifecycle.test.ts testing with mocked MercadoPago: (1) Create subscription and verify customer created, (2) Process payment webhook and verify payment recorded, (3) Upgrade plan and verify entitlements updated immediately. Mock QZPay SDK and DB calls.

tasks.title: Create E2E tests with MercadoPago sandbox
tasks.description: Create apps/api/test/e2e/sandbox/ directory with tests that hit the real MercadoPago sandbox. Tests should: create a test payment preference, simulate payment completion, verify webhook received, verify subscription state updated. These tests run in a separate CI job (not blocking main pipeline). Add configuration for sandbox credentials. Include retry logic for flaky network calls. Document how to run sandbox tests locally.

tasks.title: PlanChangeDialog: mutation, confirmation flow, error/loading states, and tests
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/billing/PlanChangeDialog.tsx (after T-006 UI is done): implement plan change mutation (POST to change-plan endpoint), confirmation step with price summary, loading states (aria-busy, role='status'), error states with retry option (role='alert'), success feedback and dialog close. Update all PlanChangeDialog tests to cover real functionality.

tasks.title: Write tests for addon-expiration.service.ts
tasks.description: Create apps/api/test/services/addon-expiration.service.test.ts covering: detection of expired addons (one-time with durationDays elapsed), processing expiration (remove entitlements, revert limit increases), grace period handling, edge cases (no expired addons, addon already cancelled, concurrent expiration).

tasks.title: Write tests for notification-retry.service.ts
tasks.description: Create apps/api/test/services/notification-retry.service.test.ts covering: retry logic (pick up failed notifications), exponential backoff timing (100/200/400ms delays), max retry limit (3 attempts), success after retry, permanent failure after max retries, concurrent retry prevention.

tasks.title: Write tests for billing middleware
tasks.description: Create apps/api/test/middlewares/billing-middleware.test.ts covering: initialization and lazy loading of billing services, context setup (billing adapter injection), error propagation from billing services, middleware count assertion consistency with create-app.test.ts.

tasks.title: Wrap billing components in error boundaries and add role='alert'
tasks.description: Wrap the following components in BillingErrorBoundary (created in T-017): ActiveAddons, PaymentMethodSection, PlanChangeDialog, SubscriptionStatusCard, InvoiceListSection, InvoicePaymentDialog, CancelSubscriptionDialog, UsageMeters. Add role='alert' to ActiveAddons error state (currently missing). Update integration tests to verify error boundary wrapping.

tasks.title: Integrate i18n in remaining billing components (8 components)
tasks.description: Replace hardcoded Spanish strings with i18n translation calls in: BillingIsland, CheckoutResultBanner, UsageMeters, LimitFallback, VipPromotionsBanner, UpgradeFallback, BillingErrorState, BillingEmptyState. Import useTranslation from i18n package. Update component tests. Run grep audit to confirm zero hardcoded Spanish strings remain across all 15 billing components.

tasks.title: E2E tests: downgrade, cancellation, and concurrent scenarios
tasks.description: Extend apps/api/test/e2e/flows/billing/subscription-lifecycle.test.ts with: (1) Downgrade plan and verify scheduled for period end, (2) Cancel subscription and verify access revoked, (3) Concurrent scenarios: simultaneous plan changes from same user, duplicate webhooks arriving at same time. Mock QZPay SDK and DB calls.
